jsonLd.title: Droom is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Droom invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of E-commerce Executive at our Meerut location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Droom:
Droom is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Droom!
